title: Warium Integrations
description: Adding further support to Warium as well as a simple guide!
body:
# **Warium Integrations**

**Warium Integrations** is a supportive addon built to make **Warium** easier to customize, easier to understand, and far more flexible for modpack creators and server owners.  
Instead of forcing players into a fixed progression, this mod gives you the tools to shape Warium into whatever experience you want it to be.

With built-in support for **KubeJS**, **JEI**, and several other quality-of-life modding features, Warium Integrations acts as the bridge between Warium’s content and the rest of your modpack. Whether you're adjusting recipes, adding new automation lines, or setting up compatibility with other mods, this addon ensures everything fits together cleanly.

### ✦ What This Mod Adds

*   **Deep KubeJS Support** – Easily modify recipes, tags, behaviour, and progression paths. Perfect for pack makers.
*   **JEI Compatibility** – Ensures Warium items, fluids, mechanics, and custom processes display correctly and intuitively.
*   **Expanded Tag Support** – Add or adjust tags for items, blocks, or fluids to improve integration across your modpack.
*   **Fluid Integration** – Custom fluids, textures, and fluid behaviours are supported or can be extended for smoother compatibility.
*   **Built for Modpacks** – Every feature aims to make Warium easier to tweak, rebalance, and integrate into larger modded environments.

### ✦ Why Use Warium Integrations?

If you're building a modpack, running a custom server, or simply love tinkering with mechanics, this addon removes the friction and lets you focus on designing the experience you want.  
Think of it as the “glue” that holds Warium and your modpack changes together.

Warium is powerful—**Warium Integrations simply lets you take that power further.**
